title: Osmium's Magic
description: This mod is a Iron's Spells 'n SpellBooks Addon. This adds new rings and new magics.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c7c3efa67dcd7ca9f93ae0a778828937b1b9bc2.png)This was created to compensate for the lack of mana capacity, casting speed, and attack power.

# Reinforcement

This is a workbench used to enhance rings, as featured in Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
![Recipe(Reinforcement Table)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af6a76dc4bda88e24171d74412a36802c921b13c.png)
Currently, TiersⅠ though Ⅲ are implemented. 

# Ingredients

・Mana Shard
![Recipe(Mana Ahard)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b74230040e6f38e936f62bcb3e5a8237feee584.png)
・Mana Ingot
![Recipe(Mana Ingot)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fe33d90331f8a6cc9b5372508371518dc5b3d06.png)
# Synthesis

This is used to create a ring that incorporates two ring effects.
![Recipe(Synthesis Table)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/414e6016c0282fa6fd312975338d5de87c272e3f.png)


# Magics
## Curse
・**Cursed Scatter**
This magic is a wide-area attack that penetrates defenses and inflicts a curse effect.
![Recipe(Cursed Scatter Spell)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52305e437dff67a1c7a95f3b08d8e103e3a15a1e.png)
![Cursed Scatter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/694a672b963cd588d1bd96151d3d839e82930245_0.webp)
